item.title: Once Upon A Farm: Buy the $1B Growth Story?
item.description: Once Upon A Farm surged in its trading debut as investors rallied behind the high-growth organic nutrition brand and its disruption of the legacy food...

item.title: Shedding Light on Aeluma’s Stock Price Outlook
item.description: Aeluma is positioned to disrupt the optical and compound semiconductor markets, amid a strategic shift to production in 2026.

item.title: Cleveland-Cliffs Sinks After Earnings—Is the Selloff Overdone?
item.description: Cleveland-Cliffs stock fell sharply after mixed earnings, but improving cash flow dynamics and a stronger 2026 outlook may support a rebound

item.title: 3 Insurance Stocks Hitting 52-Week Highs With More Room to Run
item.description: Defensive sectors are starting to break out as investors seek safer havens for their capital. These 3 insurance stocks could be the next to surge.

item.title: Marriott Vacations Worldwide: Insider Buying and Capital Return
item.description: Marriott Vacations Worldwide is getting bought by insiders, but analysts and short-sellers aren't on board and could drive this stock to new lows.
